notes: Later statements heavily confirm the Ethereum-modular-scaling, ZK/verifiable-compute, AI x crypto, and decentralized-social sector theses, plus implicit ETH and risk-on constructive posture (deal announcements, 'LFG', building emphasis). DePIN, the two concern items (US regulation, speculation), and the SOL and BTC/ETF token reads were simply not addressed in the window — marked absent, not contradicted. The window is dominated by portfolio-building and infrastructure optimism with no opposite stances taken.
